invariant: Capture dumb → reconcile deterministic → activate only with consent

test_cases.title: API health responds OK
test_cases.expected: Response 200 with {"status":"ok"}

test_cases.title: REST memory save and list round-trip
test_cases.expected: Saved memory appears with memory_id and node_id

test_cases.title: MCP list/get expose node_id for linked memories
test_cases.expected: list_memory and get_memory JSON include node_id

test_cases.title: Observations never auto-promote to active recall
test_cases.expected: Observation content absent from active memory recall

test_cases.title: Pytest failure auto-classification is idempotent
test_cases.expected: classify_failure memory created; re-run does not duplicate

test_cases.title: Chat exchange observation recorded
test_cases.expected: chat_exchange row with user/assistant excerpt

test_cases.title: Git revert observation recorded
test_cases.expected: git_revert obs with reverted file paths

test_cases.title: Verification success observation links node_id
test_cases.expected: verification_success obs references node

test_cases.title: HIGH pre-push gap observation (low confidence)
test_cases.expected: pre_push_high_gap obs with confidence ~0.4

test_cases.title: Observation REST ingest via API
test_cases.expected: Observations stored as pending drafts

test_cases.title: Poller cursor isolation from chat capture
test_cases.expected: lastObservation* fields do not overwrite chat cursor

test_cases.title: CRITICAL pre-push block records observation
manual_steps: Seed CRITICAL gap in decision queue
Run pre-push hook on sandbox repo
test_cases.expected: Push blocked; blocked_push observation spooled or persisted

test_cases.title: Recurrence mines candidate + promotion finding
test_cases.expected: candidate memory + promotion_candidate finding; obs consumed

test_cases.title: Event-type isolation in clustering
test_cases.expected: git_revert and edit_cluster never merge

test_cases.title: Revert scope confidence penalty
test_cases.expected: Active memory confidence ×0.75 when scope reverted

test_cases.title: Invalidation decay for missing scope file
test_cases.expected: Finding + confidence decay when scoped file deleted

test_cases.title: Git churn invalidation pass
test_cases.expected: Git diff since last_git_head contributes to invalidation

test_cases.title: Reconcile via API surfaces findings on decision queue
test_cases.expected: promotion_candidate in queue; no auto-active memories

test_cases.title: Semantic Pass 1 clustering (Jaccard or embedding)
test_cases.expected: Similar obs cluster within same event_type

test_cases.title: Verification success reinforces node-linked pattern
test_cases.expected: +0.05 confidence on linked learned_pattern

test_cases.title: Semantic duplicate finding (hash_bow offline)
test_cases.expected: semantic_duplicate finding when paraphrase-near actives exist

test_cases.title: Bootstrap repo_facts idempotent
test_cases.expected: repo_fact memories created once; second persist is no-op

test_cases.title: Bidirectional sync tombstone LWW
test_cases.expected: Cloud deprecated status wins over newer local active

test_cases.title: Recall by changed files excludes session_context
test_cases.expected: session_context omitted from relevant recall

test_cases.title: LLM draft does not auto-activate memory
test_cases.expected: Draft text returned; memory status unchanged

test_cases.title: Embedding duplicate pair detection (brute-force path)
test_cases.expected: Paraphrase-near pair exceeds threshold

test_cases.title: Capture → reconcile → queue (no auto-activate)
test_cases.expected: Candidate only; findings on queue

test_cases.title: Agent promotion after queue consent
test_cases.expected: status=active after consent; recall returns active

test_cases.title: Cursor on-file-change writes session_context + edit_cluster
manual_steps: Edit file in Cursor with hook installed
test_cases.expected: edit_cluster observation; not direct learned_pattern

test_cases.title: Antigravity post-commit revert hook
manual_steps: git revert commit with hook installed
test_cases.expected: git_revert observation or spool entry

test_cases.title: Claude/Codex CLI parity
test_cases.expected: Same CLI commands succeed; hook source tagged

test_cases.title: Chat capture layer (live DB)
test_cases.expected: ≥1 chat_exchange observation for repo

test_cases.title: File-edit → memory layer
test_cases.expected: pass if hook artifacts exist; warn if API-only simulation

test_cases.title: Chat → durable memory (reconcile)
test_cases.expected: warn when patterns_mined=0 (by design until TC-C01 recurrence)

test_cases.title: MCP list/save/recall round-trip
test_cases.expected: REST save, list/search, relevant recall OK

test_cases.title: Branch recall explicit isolation
test_cases.expected: Branch memory on main, excluded on other branch

test_cases.title: Branch recall inferred from workspace
test_cases.expected: TURINGMIND_WORKSPACE_DIR is git root; recall without branch param
